proposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Upper Extremity Trauma Anatomy Hub

metadata.description: Composite shoulder-to-elbow model linking clavicle, proximal humerus, shaft, distal humerus, and neurovascular structures.
S-shaped strut connecting sternum and acromion; common fracture site in shoulder trauma.
Lateral clavicle articulation with acromion; stability relevant in clavicle and shoulder injuries.
Medial clavicle articulation with manubrium; posterior displacement can threaten mediastinal structures.
Humeral head, neck, and tuberosity region forming the shoulder articular unit.
Articular surface of the proximal humerus in the glenohumeral joint.
Metaphyseal region distal to humeral head where proximal humerus fractures commonly occur.
Circumflex nerve at risk in shoulder trauma and proximal humerus surgery.
Humeral diaphysis between proximal and distal metaphyseal regions.
Posterior spiral groove nerve at risk in humeral shaft and distal humerus trauma.
Major arm artery coursing anteriorly; critical in supracondylar vascular exams.
Distal metaphyseal and articular humerus forming the proximal elbow.

proposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Medial Column Distal Humerus

metadata.description: Medial distal humeral column including trochlear region and medial epicondylar support.

proposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Lateral Column Distal Humerus

metadata.description: Lateral distal humeral column including capitellar articular support.
Posterior distal humerus recess accommodating olecranon in extension.
Lateral distal humeral articular surface for radial head articulation.
Medial distal humeral articular surface for ulnar articulation.
Motor branch of median nerve tested by FPL/FDP index function; injured in supracondylar fractures.
Anterior elbow and forearm nerve at risk in distal humerus and supracondylar injuries.
Posteromedial elbow nerve at risk in distal humerus and elbow trauma.
Hinge joint between distal humerus, radius, and ulna.
Fracture of the distal humeral articular region with column and nerve risk.

proposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Intra-articular Distal Humerus Fracture

metadata.description: Articular involvement of capitellum and/or trochlea requiring anatomic restoration.
Dual-column open reduction internal fixation of distal humerus fracture.

proposals.evidence_summary: Pilot entity: Total Elbow Arthroplasty for Trauma

metadata.description: Arthroplasty option for unreconstructable distal humerus fracture in elderly patients.
Loss of elbow motion after distal humerus fracture and immobilization.
Failure of distal humerus fracture healing with instability.

metadata.claim_text: Distal humerus fracture thinking uses medial and lateral column restoration with articular surface reconstruction.
Ulnar nerve identification and protection are essential during posterior distal humerus exposure.
Attempting complex ORIF in unreconstructable osteoporotic distal humerus fractures without discussing arthroplasty.
Elbow stiffness is a major functional complication after distal humerus fracture treatment.
Describe articular involvement, column comminution, nerve exam, splint position, and ORIF versus arthroplasty discussion.

metadata.trigger: Displaced intra-articular distal humerus fracture with reconstructable columns in suitable patient
metadata.action: Plan dual-column ORIF with attending; document nerve protection and articular reduction goals

metadata.trigger: Unreconstructable distal humerus fracture in elderly low-demand patient
metadata.action: Discuss total elbow arthroplasty with attending and postoperative activity restrictions
